content:
# Paleoenvironmental Reconstruction

**Summary**: The reconstruction of past environments from geological evidence.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to determine the setting of phosphorite deposition.

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] used microfacies analysis to perform paleoenvironmental reconstruction.

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to determine the depositional settings of the Thamama Group.

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction for the Gulf of Salwa area.

- [[2006-al-enezi|Al-Enezi, 2006]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction for the Dam Formation using modern analogs.

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] used paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the arid conditions of the Permian period.

- [[2012-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2012]] used micropaleontology to reconstruct the depositional environment.

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to distinguish fluvial and tidal influences.

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] used paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to determine the depositional settings of the carbonate platforms.

- [[2016-awad|Awad, 2016]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction for the Samma, Yabus, and Adar formations.

- [[2016-malik|Malik, 2016]] used lithofacies and micropaleontology to reconstruct the paleoenvironment.

- [[2016-septriandi|Septriandi, 2016]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction using foraminiferal morphogroups.

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] used foraminiferal assemblages to reconstruct paleoenvironments in Arabian Gulf sediments.

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the Dhruma Formation's history.

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction using foraminiferal morphogroups and geochemical indicators.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] used glacial lithofacies to aid in paleoenvironmental reconstruction.

- [[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022]] interpreted the paleoenvironmental conditions using morphogroup analysis.

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction to link lithofacies and diagenesis to sea level changes.

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] used the study of Merapi to provide insights for Mars' paleoenvironmental reconstructions.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] used foraminiferal data to reconstruct paleo-productivity and environmental changes.

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the impact of Deccan Trap volcanism.

- [[2024-alhilali|Alhilali, 2024]] examined the use of agglutinated benthic foraminifera to reconstruct paleoecological conditions.

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] used foraminifera as a proxy for paleoenvironmental reconstruction in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction for the Dhaiqa Basin.

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] used foraminiferal assemblages to reconstruct paleoenvironments and paleobathymetry.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the depositional settings of the Gudair, Hartha, and Qurna formations.

- [[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999]] used paleoenvironmental reconstruction to interpret the depositional setting of the Wajid Sandstone.

- [[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988]] used paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the history of sea level changes in the Arabian Gulf.

## Key Subtopics

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] ['microfacies-analysis', 'sedimentology']

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the Dhruma Formation's history.

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction using foraminiferal morphogroups and geochemical indicators.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] used glacial lithofacies to aid in paleoenvironmental reconstruction.

- [[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022]] interpreted the paleoenvironmental conditions using morphogroup analysis.

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] performed paleoenvironmental reconstruction to link lithofacies and diagenesis to sea level changes.

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] used the study of Merapi to provide insights for Mars' paleoenvironmental reconstructions.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] used foraminiferal data to reconstruct paleo-productivity and environmental changes.

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] performed paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the impact of Deccan Trap volcanism.

- [[2024-alhilali|Alhilali, 2024]] examined the use of agglutinated benthic foraminifera to reconstruct paleoecological conditions.

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] used foraminifera as a proxy for paleoenvironmental reconstruction in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999]] used paleoenvironmental reconstruction to interpret the depositional setting of the Wajid Sandstone.

- [[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988]] used paleoenvironmental-reconstruction to interpret the history of sea level changes in the Arabian Gulf.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] ['thin-section-petrography', 'biostratigraphy']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Determined a partially restricted continental shelf as the depositional environment. ([[1996-matter|Matter, 1996, p. 26]])

- Five distinct microfacies were used to interpret the paleoenvironmental conditions of deposition. ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 13]])

- Identified a transition from deep water lime mudstones in the Sulaiy to shallow shelf carbonates in the Shu'aiba. ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992, p. 57]])

- Identified several sea level changes, including a major regression at 110,000 y.b.p. and a Holocene transgression. ([[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988, p. 121]])

- Identified shoaling-upward cycles and high salinity conditions in the Middle Miocene. ([[2006-al-enezi|Al-Enezi, 2006, p. 13]])

- Evidence of dunes and playa lakes indicates a shift to arid conditions in the Late Paleozoic. ([[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011, p. 27]])

- Identified an open-marine shelf environment below storm wave base for the Hanadir member. ([[2012-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2012, p. 31]])

- Tabuk shows an increased tidal dominance compared to the Al Ula area. ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014, p. 25]])

- Identified distinct sedimentary facies and diagenetic signatures for different platform positions. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 111]])

- Identified various settings including alluvial fans, fluvial channels, deltaic systems, and lacustrine basins. ([[2016-awad|Awad, 2016, p. 73]])

- The environment of deposition is considered to be subtidal with facies deposited on the middle portion of a shallow open marine ramp. ([[2016-malik|Malik, 2016, p. 124]])

- Determined that the Dam Formation was deposited in an arid subtropical, hypersaline lagoonal setting. ([[2016-septriandi|Septriandi, 2016, p. 16]])

- Findings serve as a modern analogue for ancient lagoonal sediments of Cenozoic petroleum reservoirs. ([[2017-amao|Amao, 2017, p. 132]])

- Identified five major carbonate environment types from distal-to-proximal ramp settings. ([[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017, p. 18]])

- Reconstructed a transition from offshore to lower shoreface environments based on lithofacies and foraminifera. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 53]])

- Glacial deposits are used as indicators for paleoclimate reconstruction in the Arabian Plate. ([[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021, p. 18]])

- The transition from D1A to D2W shows a shift toward shallower, higher-oxygen environments. ([[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022, p. 63]])

- Reconstructed a sequence of marine, lagoonal, and arid-influenced environments over the Pleistocene-Holocene. ([[2022-khan|Khan, 2022, p. 20]])

- Merapi provides a proxy for understanding fluvial, coastal, and aeolian systems on Mars. ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 20]])

- BFAR was used as a proxy for paleo-productivity, showing higher values in Core 25 due to higher TOC levels. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 53]])

- Morphogroup analysis provided information about bathymetry and organic carbon flux. ([[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024, p. 47]])

- Foraminiferal assemblages are used as essential tools in paleoclimatology. ([[2024-alhilali|Alhilali, 2024, p. 16]])

- Mg/Ca and Na/Ca ratios were tested to reconstruct temperature and salinity, but both showed limited reliability in high-salinity conditions. ([[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024, p. 14]])

- Determined that the Dhaiqa basin transitioned from clastic-rich to clastic-poor environments, indicating a shift in depositional setting. ([[2024-malik|Malik, 2024, p. 34]])

- Identified transitions from shallow lagoonal to deeper intra-shelf basin settings during peak transgression. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 16]])

- Identified a transition from shallow platform to deep shelf conditions influenced by tectonic activity. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 169]])

- The sedimentary environment is interpreted as a continental margin. ([[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999, p. 103]])

- Identified several subaerial exposure periods and a major late Pleistocene regression. ([[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988, p. 19]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] Distinguishing between local and regional environmental controls.
